details.test: Task 1: Request CNC quote for 2,000 aluminum housings
Task 2: Add three RoHS fasteners under $2 to inquiry list
Task 3: Save automotive 2021+ cost-reduction case study to favorites
Task 4: Contact European medical-grade plastics plant with ISO 13485
Task 5: Choose finishing process with lower MOQ under 500 and request consultation
Task 6: Add highest-rated pump under $800 with >=10 reviews to RFQ
Task 7: Subscribe to technical newsletter for Aerospace and Whitepapers
Task 8: Compare two Asian injection molding suppliers and save comparison
Task 9: Schedule virtual plant tour on 2025-09-15, 10:00-11:00, Lean & Quality
